title: Silence
content:
'T is better to sit here beside the sea,
    Here on the spray-kissed beach,
    In silence, that between such friends as we
    Is full of deepest speech.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Laurence Dunbar, titled "Silence", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
